description: Unit test cases for the Data Retention Declaration Gate. Tests combinations of user_data_stored and retention_policy declarations.

test_cases.description: Not triggered — no user data stored
Not triggered — user data not stored, retention irrelevant
FAIL — user data stored, no retention policy declared
FAIL — user data stored, retention policy is empty string
FAIL — user data stored, retention policy vague: 'as long as necessary'
FAIL — user data stored, retention policy vague: 'for an appropriate period'

inputs.retention_policy: for an appropriate period in line with regulations

test_cases.description: FAIL — user data stored, retention policy vague: 'as required by law'
PASS — user data stored, specific retention: '30 days post account closure'

inputs.retention_policy: 30 days post account closure, then permanently deleted

test_cases.description: PASS — user data stored, specific retention: '7 years per FCA regulatory requirement'

inputs.retention_policy: 7 years per FCA regulatory requirement, then securely destroyed

test_cases.description: PASS — user data stored, specific retention: '90 days from last activity'
